goal: define the frozen P0 requirements for the customer module list, detail, search, relation management, and case-entry actions so personal customer master data can support intake and case operations without expanding into P1 customer scope
must_have: customer list page with the specified columns, default filters, and bulk actions
customer detail page with overview plus 5 tabs covering basic info, related cases, relations, communications, and logs
personal-customer creation from manual entry or lead conversion
search by name, furigana, phone, and email
customer information maintenance including contact info, group, and notes
related-case counts, summaries, and navigation entry points
one-click case creation and family-scenario batch case creation from customer detail
CustomerRelation creation and related-person batch case creation entry
group adjustment with traceability and no historical case backfill
permission behavior constrained by role, group, and owner/collaborator visibility
business_rules: P0 treats personal customers as the primary customer entity and does not introduce company customer master data
Lead.group to Customer.group to Case.group inheritance applies, and later customer group changes do not overwrite historical cases
duplicate prompts during creation are based on phone and email matching
related cases are surfaced as an overview and navigation surface rather than a substitute for case execution
customer communication records preserve visible_scope separation between internal and client-visible notes
customer detail does not duplicate case-owned attachments, certificate ledgers, or billing data in P0
family-scenario batch case creation is launched from customer detail and reuses the related-person context
edge_cases: empty customer list with guided create or lead-conversion entry
duplicate-customer prompt during creation when phone or email matches an existing record
customer with all related cases archived and therefore no active-case flag
customer with multiple related cases requiring +N expansion in the overview
group adjustment that must preserve historical case ownership snapshots
acceptance_criteria: the list page renders the required customer fields, filters, and bulk actions
the detail page renders the overview block and the required 5 tabs with their defined data and actions
creating a personal customer creates a Customer and, for lead conversion, inherits Lead.group
search supports name, furigana, phone, and email lookup
related cases expose counts, activity split, name summary, and case navigation
one-click case creation and family batch creation launch from the customer page with the customer pre-bound
CustomerRelation records can be created and used for related-person batch case creation entry
visibility and edit permissions match the administrator, lead, assistant, and sales/front-desk matrix
